title: RAGAnswer
description: Public chatbot grounded answer. Structured-output-safe (no numeric/length constraints, additionalProperties:false). The '>=1 citation when substantive, else abstained=true' rule is enforced by acceptance check AC-1, not by this schema.

answer.description: The answer text, grounded ONLY in provided context. Empty/short when abstained=true.

citations.description: Sources grounding the answer. Each source_id MUST resolve to a chunk actually returned by KnowledgeCore.semantic_search for this query (verified at runtime gate, not just presence).

abstained.description: true when context is insufficient to answer faithfully; answer must then ask for clarification rather than guess.
